prompt: Retro 16-bit style platformer showing a pixel art knight battling a mechanical boss robot in a factory setting. Knight wielding an energy sword while dodging laser beams and steam vents. Include classic arcade UI: lives counter with heart icons, score display, boss health bar, collected coins, and power-up status. Vibrant pixel art with industrial background featuring conveyor belts and sparking machinery
prompt_refined: Generate a vibrant 16-bit pixel art style screenshot of a retro platformer video game. The scene depicts a heroic pixel art knight, dynamically dodging laser beams and steam vents, while wielding a glowing energy sword against a massive mechanical boss robot. The setting is a detailed industrial factory environment with active conveyor belts, sparking machinery, and metallic platforms. The screenshot incorporates a classic arcade UI: a score display and lives counter with heart icons in the top-left corner; a prominent boss health bar spanning the top of the screen; a collected coins counter with a coin icon in the top-right corner; and a power-up status indicator in the bottom-right corner.
objects: Industrial factory environment with conveyor belts, sparking machinery, and metallic platforms
Score display and lives counter with heart icons in top-left corner
Prominent boss health bar spanning the top of the screen
Collected coins counter with coin icon in top-right corner
Power-up status indicator in bottom-right corner
